title: BEM-831 route autotest
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:49 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem830_autotest_after_bad_json_fix.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='autotest_pass_all_proofs':
    status='autotest_pass_route_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and prepare agreed protocol'
elif 'queue_json_all_valid' in missing:
    status='autotest_fail_route_queue_json'
    next_action='repair remaining malformed queue JSON'
elif 'processor_marker_seen' in missing or 'dispatch_result_exists' in missing:
    status='autotest_fail_route_dispatch_processor'
    next_action='repair queue processor execution/result writer'
elif 'claude_runtime_state_exists' in missing:
    status='autotest_fail_route_claude_runtime'
    next_action='repair Claude dispatcher runtime/state writer'
elif 'real_claude_response_exists' in missing:
    status='autotest_fail_route_real_response'
    next_action='repair Claude Action/provider response writer'
else:
    status='autotest_fail_route_unknown'
    next_action='diagnose autotest unknown missing state'
state={'bem':'BEM-831','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem831_route_after_autotest.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem831_route_after_autotest.md').write_text('# BEM-831 | Route After Autotest | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem831_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-831'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem831_route_after_autotest.json','governance/reports/bem831_route_after_autotest.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem831_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-830 autotest based on missing proof list')
"""
No issue comments.
